artifact_notes.first_upload_attempt: Reached 100% but failed with ConnectionResetError; Kaggle did not create a submission record, so it did not consume an effective counted submission.
artifact_notes.large_file_sync: Large zip/weight artifact sync is intentionally excluded from metadata sync due very low remote transfer throughput; local full artifact is retained.

records.error_description: Evaluation metric raised an unexpected error

strategy_conclusion.next_direction: Stop spending submissions on Kien residual/interpolation around the destructive cycle01 delta. Alpha 0.01 and 0.005 both scored 0.85, below the original Kien 0.86 control. Next iterations should return to the Kien 0.86 baseline and seek a new signal from data/category-targeted training or a genuinely new public 0.86+ adapter, not smaller residual steps.
